query:
-- Backfill service_billing_assignments from billing_items.serviceExternalId
-- Only insert rows where there's no existing assignment for this billing item
INSERT INTO service_billing_assignments 
  (billingItemExternalId, serviceExternalId, customerExternalId, assignedBy, assignmentMethod, notes, assignmentBucket)
SELECT 
  bi.externalId,
  bi.serviceExternalId,
  bi.customerExternalId,
  'system-backfill',
  'auto',
  'Backfilled from billing_items.serviceExternalId (legacy import)',
  'standard'
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.serviceExternalId IS NOT NULL 
  AND bi.serviceExternalId != ''
  AND bi.matchStatus = 'service-matched'
  AND bi.lineAmount > 0
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM service_billing_assignments sba 
    WHERE sba.billingItemExternalId = bi.externalId
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM services s WHERE s.externalId = bi.serviceExternalId
  );

-- Backfill service_billing_assignments from billing_items.serviceExternalId
-- Only insert rows where there's no existing assignment for this billing item
INSERT INTO service_billing_assignments 
  (billingItemExternalId, serviceExternalId, customerExternalId, assignedBy, assignmentMethod, notes, assignmentBucket)
SELECT 
  bi.externalId,
  bi.serviceExternalId,
  bi.customerExternalId,
  'system-backfill',
  'auto',
  'Backfilled from billing_items.serviceExternalId (legacy import)',
  'standard'
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.serviceExternalId IS NOT NULL 
  AND bi.serviceExternalId != ''
  AND bi.matchStatus = 'service-matched'
  AND bi.lineAmount > 0
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM service_billing_assignments sba 
    WHERE sba.billingItemExternalId = bi.externalId
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM services s WHERE s.externalId = bi.serviceExternalId
  );
